title: Silky Russian Noodles
description: A unique and creamy take on traditional Russian noodles. This dish combines the best of both worlds, with a silky sauce and perfectly cooked noodles.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the noodles according to the package instructions.
In a separate pan, heat the silky sauce over medium heat.
Add the chopped innovative herbs to the silky sauce and stir to combine.
Once the noodles are cooked, drain them and add to the silky sauce.
Toss the noodles in the sauce to coat.
